name: Cheesy Popovers
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the seasonings with milk and eggs; add flour and cheese; mix until just blended.
2. Pour the mixture into well-oiled muffin tins, filling them 2/3 full.
3. Do not preheat the oven.
4. Place the muffin tin in the oven and heat to 450 degrees.
5. Bake for 30 minutes without peeking.
6. Remove from the oven; turn off the heat.
7. Pierce the popovers on all four sides at right angles.
8. Return to the oven (do not turn on the heat). Allow the popovers to dry in the oven about 10 minutes.
9. Serve immediately.
